message:
fix(mux): resolve Context trait conflict and missing TryInto import

1. termwiztermtab.rs: Remove conflicting termwiz::Context import that
   shadowed anyhow::Context. In do_input_poll (which returns
   termwiz::Result), replace .context() calls with direct
   termwiz::error::Error construction to avoid trait ambiguity.

2. domain.rs: Add explicit `use std::convert::TryInto` — the mux
   crate uses edition 2018 where TryInto is not in the prelude,
   causing baud.try_into() to fail.

Both bugs were only visible when compiling with specific feature
combinations (mcp+web+subprocess-bridge+vendored+disk-pressure).

Validated: 299 mux tests pass, multi-feature lib check clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
